title: OWASP's Extensive Access Mitigation Guidelines
scope: Role-Based Access Control, Attribute-Based Access Control
summary: An in-depth guide on how to design an RBAC or ABAC model to achieve a reusable, authorization-centric architecture.
contains: Mitigation of Insecure Direct Object Reference

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'OWASP's Extensive Access Mitigation Guidelines'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'OWASP's Extensive Access Mitigation Guidelines'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'OWASP's Extensive Access Mitigation Guidelines'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: OWASP Cryptographic Storage Cheat Sheet
summary: The quick reference determines current strong algorithms (such as Argon2 for passwords, AES-GCM for data) and minimum key length recommendations.

roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'OWASP Cryptographic Storage Cheat Sheet'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: OWASP Logging Vocabulary and Guidelines
